# @agent-os/decision-gate

## Purpose

Durable decision gate vocabulary, projection, and admitter for cross-actor or
cross-time approval.

## Public API Status

0.5.x active development. Public exports are listed in `PUBLIC_API.md` to prevent accidental exports; they are not frozen.

## Invariant

A decision request, decision, and consumption are separate ledger facts. The
package records gate state; the app owns approval policy. A consumed decision
cannot be reused.

## Minimal Usage

Emit gate events through the package helpers, derive gate state from the
projection, and pass the projection to the admitter. Rejection is explicit;
there is no fallback approval.

```ts
import { projectDecisionGate } from "@agent-os/decision-gate";
```

## Verification

```sh
cd packages/carriers/decision-gate
vp test run
```
